claim: Track A covers wallet-facing Uniswap router, manager, Permit2, Universal Router, UniswapX signing, UniswapX reactor settlement semantic decoding, and reviewed mainnet direct V3 pool sample coverage. This is not a full every-factory-child protocol completion claim.

covered_surfaces.evidence: Concrete manifests under registryV2/manifests/uniswap/v2-router-02; registryV2 check:surface/check:manifest/build gates pass.
Concrete manifests under registryV2/manifests/uniswap/swap-router-02; strict Uniswap corpus has expect_body pins for representative swaps.
Concrete manifests under registryV2/manifests/uniswap/v3-nfpm plus V3 position NFT token_kind metadata updates on supported chains; V3 position-fees live decoder/arg resolver implemented.

V4 position-manager manifests cover liquidity, transfer, approval, Permit2 forwarding, and NFT permit surfaces; PoolManager.initialize remains explicit ActionBody::Unknown rather than a silent allow path.
Manifests under registryV2/manifests/uniswap/universal-router; strict corpus pins nested multicall outcomes including empty/no-deadline cases.

covered_surfaces.surface: Permit2 allowance signing, allowance management, and direct AllowanceTransfer execution
covered_surfaces.evidence: Permit2 allowance and SignatureTransfer typed-data manifests route and decode; nonceBitmap live freshness is implemented; direct AllowanceTransfer and SignatureTransfer execution are surfaced as owner-aware token fund movement.
Typed-data manifests under registryV2/manifests/uniswapx route as signing intents; UniswapFetcher parses quote/open-order API response shapes for expected fill price and competing order count.

Verified reactor ABI snapshots and coverage were added for mainnet ExclusiveDutch/V2Dutch, Arbitrum V3Dutch, and Base Priority reactors. Four reactor settlement selectors route via registryV2/manifests/uniswapx/reactor as Amm::SettleIntentOrder; uniswapx corpus is 3/3 pass with expect_body pins.

covered_surfaces.surface: Representative mainnet direct Uniswap V3 pool
covered_surfaces.evidence: Dune PoolCreated metadata for 0x2c40c7b9f106f39a6e2aab6d9f1f29364e7250bc materializes token0/token1/fee context. Direct pool swap emits first-class Amm::Swap; remaining mutable V3 pool sample entrypoints route explicit Unknown/fail-closed and pass surface gate.

deferred_surfaces.surface: Direct Uniswap V2 pair calls and V2 LP pair token inventory
deferred_surfaces.reason: Dune counted 3,533,066 V2 pair rows. Track A covers user-facing router paths. Etherscan eth_call enriched 2/4 representative V2 pair candidates (mainnet/arbitrum) into token registry LP metadata; LP ERC20 movements are covered by token-generated standard ERC20 callkeys, while direct sample pair calls are source-materialized via uniswap:v2_pair_candidates. Base/Optimism sample enrichment is blocked by the free Etherscan plan. Full direct pair coverage still requires generated callkeys, full LP token generation, and pair-level action semantics.

deferred_surfaces.surface: Full direct Uniswap V3 pool universe
deferred_surfaces.reason: Dune counted 1,981,372 V3 pool rows. Track A covers one reviewed mainnet direct-pool sample; full coverage needs generated callkeys and source/live-input population for every pool.
Dune counted 14,898,393 initialized V4 pool ids. Track A keeps wallet-facing V4 manager coverage and explicit unknown handling for raw PoolManager initialize.

track_a_gates.command: cargo run -p policy-engine-integration-tests --bin v3-harness -- corpus --filter uniswap --require-expect-body
track_a_gates.summary: 50/50 matched; semantic expect_body: 50/50 pass entries pinned

Preserved successful sweep: 33 cover addresses queried; 143,569 raw txs; 143,199 input txs; 142,332 matched, 338 excluded, 529 unmatched; floorMet=true. A latest rerun was attempted after the direct V3/UniswapX changes but sandbox networking returned fetch failures and external rerun approval was blocked by usage limits.

track_a_gates.gate: Etherscan V2 LP token inventory sample
track_a_gates.summary: 2/4 representative V2 pair candidates enriched with token0/token1/name/symbol/decimals via Etherscan eth_call and written as LP token metadata. LP approve/transfer/transferFrom route through token-generated standard ERC20 callkeys; representative direct V2 pair manifests for sync/swap/mint/burn/skim/permit are source-materialized from uniswap:v2_pair_candidates; both sample pair surfaces are ABI/coverage gated. Base/Optimism sample candidates remain blocked by the free Etherscan chain coverage plan.

registryV2 check:surface/check:manifest/build gates pass after Track A, Permit2 SignatureTransfer, UniswapX reactor semantic settlement, V2 pair samples, and V3 direct pool sample fixes: full build 52,920 callkeys + 84 typed-data across 786 manifests; representative manifest validation 1,457 single_emit manifests OK. Targeted Rust sync/action/mapper tests pass.

remaining_completion_blockers: Full factory-child universe is counted and batch-deferred but not materialized into per-child callkeys.

Full V2 LP pair token inventory remains coupled to the Track B pair universe; 2/4 representative candidates now have Etherscan-backed token metadata, token-generated standard ERC20 LP callkeys, ABI/coverage-gated source-materialized direct pair sample callkeys, and universe cover linkage.
Full V3 pool universe remains beyond the representative mainnet direct-pool sample.
Latest Etherscan rerun could not complete inside sandbox; preserved prior mainnet+Arbitrum sweep still exceeds the 20,000 raw tx floor.
No final stage/commit has been made.
